name: Preview Panel Close
notes: The close button at line 101 invokes the `onClose` prop callback; PreviewPanel owns no close logic itself.
Close state is held in App class component: `selectedDocument` is set to null and `showPreview` to false — no Redux slice is involved.
PreviewPanel is conditionally rendered via `{showPreview && <PreviewPanel .../>}` in App.jsx:101-106; a close unmounts the component fully and releases pdf.js internal state.
The `formatFileSize` utility is imported from the DocumentGrid god component (anti-pattern FR-014); the Angular replacement should import from a standalone utility service.
